components.name: Used cars and trucks
components.fallback_driver: free fallback: recent CPI-timed movement + same-month seasonal average
components.driverSnapshot: SETA02 SA model: rho 0.47 * prior CPI SA -0.23 pp + Manheim m2 signal +0.00 pp * volatility scale 0.71 + level gap z=-1.07, mean-reversion adj +0.02 pp; timing m0 2026-07 unavailable in Manheim feed; m2 2026-05 +0.32% pub 2026-06-08; omitted unavailable m0. Compared against CUSR0000SETA02; no asymmetry term kept. SA forecast converted to NSA using the component's historical SA/NSA offset.

feedStatus.name: Used cars and trucks
feedStatus.details: Loaded public XLSX (https://www.coxautoinc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/Manheim-Used-Vehicle-Value-Index-Data.June_.xlsx); add data/manual/manheim_uvvi.csv to override.
feedStatus.publicationRule: month-end final assumed published on the 7th of the following month, weekend-adjusted; lag 0 is used only if publication date is before CPI release

components.name: Airline fares
components.fallback_driver: free fallback: recent CPI-timed movement + same-month seasonal average
components.driverSnapshot: airfare fallback -0.78% plus guarded jet-fuel pass-through -1.08% from EIA Gulf Coast jet fuel calendar-month average $2.767/gal vs prior $3.042/gal using 3 daily prints

projectionComponents.name: Other motor fuels
projectionComponents.projectionSourceDetail: EIA weekly U.S. No. 2 diesel retail calendar-month average $4.687/gal vs prior $5.024/gal using 2 weekly prints; fitted retail pass-through beta 0.903 on 129 prior months; NSA forecast -6.06%
